# AwesomeAPI

## AwesomeAPI

- [Bem-vindo!](https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/master.md)
- [API de Cotações](https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/api-de-moedas.md): API de Cotações em tempo real com mais de 150 moedas!
- [API CEP](https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/api-cep.md): Base de CEP IBGE atualizado periódicamente
- [API gRPC](https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/api-cep/api-grpc.md)
- [API Busca de Endereços](https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/api-cep/api-busca-de-enderecos.md): Busca de endereços brasileiros por geolocalização ou texto.
- [Instruções API Key](https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/instrucoes-api-key.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.awesomeapi.com.br/master.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
